sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current character position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'B' and n['pixels'] == 40:
        print(f"Black char: boundary={n['boundary'][:8]}")
        break

# Check adjacency
print("\nAdjacency list:")
for a in seg['adjacency_list']:
    i, j = a
    ci = seg['nodes'][i]['color']
    cj = seg['nodes'][j]['color']
    pi = seg['nodes'][i]['pixels']
    pj = seg['nodes'][j]['pixels']
    if pi < 100 or pj < 100:
        print(f"  {i}(color={ci}, px={pi}) - {j}(color={cj}, px={pj})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
